name: Stormcall
additional_info: Your Stormcall Shocks from other Specialist Equipment Talents apply the Stormcall Shock status effect. If your opponent attempts to cast a Mantra while affected, they will take 15 Galebreathe/Thundercall damage and they will gain the Shock and Winded status effect.
desc: Anytime you land a storm strike apply stormcall shock on your opponent, damaging them if they try to use a mantra while its active.
